description_long: This is a large, stylized hammer with a rectangular, blocky head featuring glowing blue patterns along its edges and faces. The head is predominantly black with intricate, luminous blue designs, including a prominent triquetra symbol on one side. The handle is cylindrical, black, and segmented with visible grip rings, ending in a rounded pommel. The hammer's design is reminiscent of mythological or fantasy weapons, with a futuristic or magical aesthetic due to the glowing accents. The overall construction appears robust and heavy, suitable for display or ceremonial use rather than practical construction tasks. No visible signs of wear, branding, or attachments are present.
description: A large, black hammer with glowing blue patterns and a segmented grip handle, featuring a triquetra symbol on one face. The design is robust and fantasy-inspired.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, flat face of the hammer head with blue glowing edge patterns and a central indentation.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the rectangular profile of the head and the blue illuminated side panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the triquetra symbol in blue on the hammer head, with matching glowing edge details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the rectangular head and blue illuminated side panels.
attribute_handle_type: Black cylindrical handle with segmented grip rings, likely metal or hard plastic, straight and textured for enhanced grip.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular, blocky sledge-type head with flat striking faces and glowing blue decorative patterns; no claws or peens.
